name: TREDEGAR CORP
business: Tredegar Corporation manufactures aluminum extrusions and polyethylene and polypropylene plastic films through its Aluminum Extrusions and High Performance Films segments. Aluminum Extrusions produces custom aluminum extrusions for building & construction, automotive & transportation, consumer durables, machinery & equipment, electrical & renewable energy, and distribution markets. High Performance Films produces surface protection films, advanced packaging films, and films for other markets, serving high-technology applications including flat panel and flexible displays.
sellsTo: Manufacturers of optical and specialty substrates
Flat panel and flexible display manufacturers

exposures.sentence: Automotive & transportation: Automotive and light truck structural components, battery enclosures for electric vehicles, after-market automotive accessories, grills for heavy trucks, travel trailers and recreation vehicles

These films, which are manufactured at facilities in the U.S. and China, support manufacturers of optical and other specialty substrates used in high-technology applications, most notably protecting high-value components of flat panel and flexible displays used in televisions, monitors, notebooks, smartphones, tablets, e-readers, electronic shelf labels, automobiles and flexible solar panels during the manufacturing and transportation processes.

Building & construction ( B&C ) - nonresidential Commercial windows and doors, curtain walls, storefronts and entrances, automatic entry doors, walkway covers, ducts, louvers and vents, office wall panels, partitions and interior enclosures, acoustical walls and ceilings, point of purchase displays, pre-engineered structures, and flooring trims (Futura TransitionsTM by Bonnell Aluminum)

catalysts.event: Board evaluation of new ERP/MES project design and capital needed
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects that in late 2026 the Board will evaluate the new project design and capital needed for implementation based on the Company's earnings, financial position, expected cash needs, and other relevant considerations.
